\tzpentry{ID3840}{Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3840 introduces Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\mathcal{H}_{\text{gyro}} = L^2\bigl(SO(3), \mathrm{d}\mu_{\text{Haar}}\bigr)\)
\]
